title: Drift
overview: After fleeing civil war in Liberia, a formerly-privileged refugee is barely scraping by in her new life in Greece when she strikes up an unexpected friendship with a rootless tour guide.

trailers.title: L'ECHAPPEE (Drift) d'Anthony Chen, sortie au cinéma le 24 avril 2024
